articles.title: July 4th live updates as weather woes impact celebrations and National Mall evacuated - CBS News
articles.description: Americans celebrated 250 years of independence this Fourth of July, although severe weather put a damper on the proceedings in several parts of the country.
articles.content: The four living former presidents — Bill Clinton, George W. Bush, Barack Obama and Joe Biden — each shared individual messages remembering the sacrifices and successes of the United States of America… [+2206 chars]

articles.title: Michael Dell celebrates America’s 250th birthday with gift to seed the American Dream for millions of kids - Fox Business
articles.description: Michael Dell pledged $250 for the first 25 million qualifying children who sign up for Trump Accounts as the federal investment program officially launched on Independence Day.
